notes: Traditional B2B data exchange protocol; still used in healthcare/retail but declining vs APIs
Financial transaction protocol; still active in ACH/wire transfer systems
Managed EDI transmission networks; largely superseded by AS2/SFTP/APIs
Web-based B2B commerce; the "new EC" Aberdeen analyzed; now dominant
XML as EDI replacement protocol; evolved into EDI/XML hybrid standards
Internet security standard; Appendix A covers security implementation
Hub-and-spoke trading exchanges; most failed post-dot-com; concept persists in modern platforms
Integration of ERP back-ends with e-commerce front-ends; now standard
